features.name: port with bundle type containing flip fields
features.description: Code should include a module port with a bundle type that contains flip-directed fields
features.snippet: module test(input clock, inout bundle<valid: uint<1>, ready: flip<uint<1>> io); endmodule

features.name: nested bundle type with vector fields on port
features.description: Code should include a module port with a bundle type containing nested bundles and vector fields
features.snippet: module test(input clock, inout bundle<state: vector<uint<1>, 8>, data: bundle<a: uint<8>, b: uint<8>> io); endmodule

features.name: deeply nested bundle with multiple flip directions
features.description: Code should include a module port with deeply nested bundle types having multiple flip directions
features.snippet: module test(input clock, inout bundle<a: bundle<x: flip<uint<1>>, y: uint<1>>, b: flip<bundle<z: uint<8>>> io); endmodule
